    U

    ui - Static variable in class gui.GameScene
    The singleton instance of the game scene.
    ui - Static variable in class gui.MainMenu
    The singleton instance of the main menu.
    ui - Static variable in class gui.SettingsMenu
    The singleton instance of the settings menu.
    ui - Static variable in class gui.SummaryMenu
    The singleton instance of the summary menu.
    ui - Static variable in class gui.TutorialScene
    The singleton instance of the tutorial scene.
    Updatable - Interface in logic
    Interface for updatable logic entities.
    update() - Method in class logic.counters.ChoppingBoardCounter
    Updates the object's state per tick.

    Updates the object's state per tick.

    Updates the object's state per tick.

    Updates the object's state per tick.

    Updates the object's state per tick.

    Updates the object's state per tick.

    Updates the object's state per tick.

    Updates the object's state per tick.
    update() - Method in interface logic.Updatable
    Updates the object's state per tick.
    updateCash() - Static method in class gui.GameScene
    Update cash UI
    updateDayCount() - Static method in class gui.GameScene
    Update day count UI
    updateIngredientOrderUI(ItemSpriteType, String) - Method in class gui.GameScene
    Update the PC shop UI's undelivered ingredient order list.
    updateItemAppearance() - Method in class sprites.ItemSprite
    Updating the image of the sprite to match of that the item.
    updateMilkSupplyLabel() - Method in class gui.room.ColdZoneRoom
    Update milk supply indicator UI
    updateOrderRack() - Method in class gui.room.ServingRoom
    Update order rack as food order are added to the GameInstance.
    updateOrderRack() - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Updating order rack UI in the serving room
    updateTime() - Static method in class gui.GameScene
    Update timer UI
    If timer reach 18:00, The timer shows "END DAY"
    updateUi() - Method in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Updates the UI with the latest game statistics.
    updateVolume() - Method in class util.BGMManager
    Updates the volume for all loaded music tracks.
    useMilkSupply() - Static method in class logic.counters.IceCreamMachine
    Uses one unit of milk supply.
    util - package util
    Contains general utility classes and wrapper objects used across the application.
    util.wrapper - package util.wrapper
    Contains wrapper classes for audio logic, primarily used by the util package.
